testcase.name: test_memory_to_file_promotion

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'promotion_value' + where None = get_file('promotion_key') + where get_file = <src.infrastructure.cache.core.multi_level_cache.MultiLevelCache object at 0x00000127698AB670>.get_file + where <src.infrastructure.cache.core.multi_level_cache.MultiLevelCache object at 0x00000127698AB670> = <RQA2025.tests.unit.infrastructure.cache.test_multi_level_cache.TestMultiLevelCache object at 0x00000127693C2C40>.cache

testcase.failure:
self = <RQA2025.tests.unit.infrastructure.cache.test_multi_level_cache.TestMultiLevelCache object at 0x00000127693C2C40>
def test_memory_to_file_promotion(self): """测试内存到文件的提升""" test_key = 'promotion_key' test_value = 'promotion_value'
# 首先设置到内存 self.cache.set_memory(test_key, test_value)
# 验证内存中有值 assert self.cache.get_memory(test_key) == test_value
# 同步到文件 self.cache.sync_memory_to_file()
# 验证文件中有值 > assert self.cache.get_file(test_key) == test_value E AssertionError: assert None == 'promotion_value' E + where None = get_file('promotion_key') E + where get_file = <src.infrastructure.cache.core.multi_level_cache.MultiLevelCache object at 0x00000127698AB670>.get_file E + where <src.infrastructure.cache.core.multi_level_cache.MultiLevelCache object at 0x00000127698AB670> = <RQA2025.tests.unit.infrastructure.cache.test_multi_level_cache.TestMultiLevelCache object at 0x00000127693C2C40>.cache
tests\unit\infrastructure\cache\test_multi_level_cache.py:224: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_performance_benchmark
testcase.failure:
self = <RQA2025.tests.unit.infrastructure.cache.test_multi_level_cache.TestMultiLevelCache object at 0x000001E8B8A7F6A0>
def test_performance_benchmark(self): """测试性能基准""" import time
# 性能测试：设置操作 start_time = time.time() num_operations = 500
for i in range(num_operations): self.cache.set(f'perf_key_{i}', f'perf_value_{i}')
set_time = time.time() - start_time
# 性能测试：获取操作 start_time = time.time()
for i in range(num_operations): value = self.cache.get(f'perf_key_{i}') > assert value == f'perf_value_{i}' E AssertionError: assert None == 'perf_value_0'
tests\unit\infrastructure\cache\test_multi_level_cache.py:473: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_get_from_cache_hit_l1
testcase.failure:
self = <RQA2025.tests.unit.infrastructure.cache.test_multi_level_cache_comprehensive.TestMultiLevelCacheBasicOperations object at 0x00000249740267C0> cache = <infrastructure.cache.core.multi_level_cache.MultiLevelCache object at 0x000002497456DBE0>
def test_get_from_cache_hit_l1(self, cache): """测试从L1缓存命中""" # 设置L1命中 cache.layers[0].get.return_value = "l1_value" cache.layers[1].get.return_value = None
result = cache.get("test_key")
> assert result == "l1_value" E AssertionError: assert None == 'l1_value'
tests\unit\infrastructure\cache\test_multi_level_cache_comprehensive.py:85: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_put_to_cache

failure.message: AssertionError: expected call not found. Expected: put('test_key', 'test_value') Actual: not called.

testcase.failure:
self = <MagicMock name='mock.put' id='2585196717872'> args = ('test_key', 'test_value'), kwargs = {} expected = "put('test_key', 'test_value')", actual = 'not called.' error_message = "expected call not found.\nExpected: put('test_key', 'test_value')\nActual: not called."
def assert_called_with(self, /, *args, **kwargs): """assert that the last call was made with the specified arguments.
Raises an AssertionError if the args and keyword args passed in are different to the last call to the mock.""" if self.call_args is None: expected = self._format_mock_call_signature(args, kwargs) actual = 'not called.' error_message = ('expected call not found.\nExpected: %s\nActual: %s' % (expected, actual)) > raise AssertionError(error_message) E AssertionError: expected call not found. E Expected: put('test_key', 'test_value') E Actual: not called.
C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\unittest\mock.py:898: AssertionError
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
self = <RQA2025.tests.unit.infrastructure.cache.test_multi_level_cache_comprehensive.TestMultiLevelCacheBasicOperations object at 0x00000259E984BC70> cache = <infrastructure.cache.core.multi_level_cache.MultiLevelCache object at 0x00000259E92F7880>
def test_put_to_cache(self, cache): """测试写入缓存""" cache.put("test_key", "test_value")
# 验证所有层级都被写入 > cache.layers[0].put.assert_called_with("test_key", "test_value") E AssertionError: expected call not found. E Expected: put('test_key', 'test_value') E Actual: not called.
tests\unit\infrastructure\cache\test_multi_level_cache_comprehensive.py:111: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_cache_persistence_and_recovery
test_data_consistency_across_tiers
testcase.failure:
self = <RQA2025.tests.unit.infrastructure.cache.test_multi_level_cache.TestMultiLevelCache object at 0x0000020CA91611C0>
def test_data_consistency_across_tiers(self): """测试跨层级的数据一致性""" test_key = 'consistency_key' test_value = 'consistency_value'
# 设置值 self.cache.set(test_key, test_value)
# 从不同层级获取值 value = self.cache.get(test_key) assert value == test_value
# 验证内存层 memory_value = self.cache.get_memory(test_key) assert memory_value == test_value
# 验证文件层 file_value = self.cache.get_file(test_key) > assert file_value == test_value E AssertionError: assert None == 'consistency_value'
tests\unit\infrastructure\cache\test_multi_level_cache.py:207: AssertionError
